message:
feat: show existing installs in demo Flight Plan blueprint (#5377)

In demo mode, Prometheus and cert-manager are marked as already
installed on the first cluster. The blueprint renders them with
solid green rings (installed) vs dashed rings (new deploy), showing
the mixed installed/new-deploy visual that Mission Control produces
with real clusters.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
